wpn_aegis_blade_01.name: Dull Aegis Blade
wpn_aegis_blade_01.description: A rusted blade that feels strangely heavy, as if weighted by forgotten years.
wpn_aegis_blade_01.lore: The original weapon of the Archive, now stripped of its history.

wpn_aegis_blade_02.name: Refined Aegis Blade
wpn_aegis_blade_02.description: The rust has flaked away, revealing shimmering silver filigree.

mechanics.ability: Memory Echo: Chance to deal double damage on third strike.

wpn_aegis_blade_02.progression: Requires Shard of Courage and 500 Essence.

tool_lantern_01.name: The Memory Lantern
tool_lantern_01.description: A blue-flamed lantern that reveals things that aren't there anymore.
tool_lantern_01.lore: Elara's gift. It burns using the 'will to know'.

mechanics.active: Reveal hidden platforms and invisible 'Ink-Born' enemies within a small radius.

tool_pulse_01.name: Compassion Pulse
tool_pulse_01.description: A resonant stone that emits a wave of empathetic energy.

mechanics.active: Heals wilted environmental hazards (brambles) and stuns 'Hollow' enemies.

tool_pulse_01.progression: Unlocked after retrieving the Shard of Empathy.

tool_hook_01.name: The Tether of Regret
tool_hook_01.description: A spectral chain that can latch onto '錨' (Anchor) points.
tool_hook_01.lore: A physical manifestation of the ties that bind the past to the present.

mechanics.active: Pulls Kaelen to distant hooks or pulls light enemies toward him.

art_shard_01.name: Shard of Identity
art_shard_01.description: A prismatic fragment that hums with the sound of a thousand names.
art_shard_01.impact: Unlocks basic combat skills and the ability to interact with Oakhaven NPCs.

art_heart_piece.name: Fragment of Vitality
art_heart_piece.mechanics: Collecting 4 increases Max Health by 1 Heart.

art_tome_void.name: The Forbidden Tome
art_tome_void.description: A book whose pages are made of pure shadow.
art_tome_void.impact: Required to enter the Citadel of Erasure; reveals Malakor's true origin.

con_essence_vial.name: Condensed Thought
con_essence_vial.description: A shimmering liquid that tastes like a childhood summer.
